news.t: YieldMax® ETFs Announces Distributions on MSST, NVIT, and TEST
YieldMax® Launches New Fund Family Focused on Growth + Income: Performance and Distribution Target 25™ ETFs

holdings.infoBox: NVIT is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax NVDA Performance & Distribution Target 25 ETF (NVIT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund targets an annual 25% distribution level through a combination of synthetic long exposure to Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA) stock and options strategies to generate premiums. NVIT was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
